name: Inside Caras Galadon
description:
You slowly walk around the city, still a bit surprised to be within a place of
such peace and beauty.  You walk under a small wooden eve and finally arrive
just beyond the wall itself.  The city of Caras Galadon lies before you in all
its glory!  Sounds of the bustling city float past you, as you pause to take in
the sights.  A small flet is in the tree directly in front of you, standing by
itself.
